First, firm effects typically explain around 20% of the variance of log-earnings, pointing to the importance of firm-specific wage-setting for earnings inequality. Second, the correlation between firm and worker effects is often small and sometimes negative, indicating little if any sorting of high-wage workers to high-paying firms. The objective of this paper is to assess the sensitivity of these conclusions to the biases that arise because of limited mobility of workers across firms. We use employer-employee data from the US and several European countries while taking advantage of both fixed-effects and random-effects methods for bias-correction. We find that limited mobility bias is severe and that bias-correction is important. Once one corrects for limited mobility bias, firm effects dispersion matters less for earnings inequality and worker sorting becomes always positive and typically strong.
27368.zh_abstract: 许多研究使用雇主-雇员匹配数据来估计一个收入决定的统计模型，其中对数收入表示为工人效应、企业效应、协变量和特质误差项之和。基于该模型的估计得出了两个有影响力但有争议的结论。首先，企业效应通常解释对数收入方差的约20%，表明企业特定工资设定对收入不平等的重要性。其次，企业效应与工人效应之间的相关性通常很小，有时甚至为负，表明高工资工人很少（如果有的话）流向高薪企业。本文旨在评估这些结论对因工人跨企业流动性有限而产生的偏差的敏感性。我们利用来自美国和几个欧洲国家的雇主-雇员数据，同时采用固定效应和随机效应方法进行偏差校正。我们发现有限流动性偏差严重，偏差校正很重要。一旦校正了有限流动性偏差，企业效应离散度对收入不平等的影响变小，工人分类始终为正且通常很强。

27367.title: Duration-Based Stock Valuation: Reassessing Stock Market Performance and Volatility
27367.zh_title: 基于久期的股票估值：重新评估股市表现与波动性
27367.abstract: Using a panel of international government bond data, I construct fixed income portfolios that match the duration of the dividend strips of the corresponding local aggregate stock market index. I find that these bond portfolios have performed as well as -- if not better than -- their stock counterparts in the past half century while exhibiting similar (or even higher) levels of volatility. These results provide a novel perspective on both the equity risk premium and excess volatility puzzles (bubbles). I present several potential explanations, and discuss further the implications for macroeconomics, monetary economics, asset pricing, and corporate finance.
27367.zh_abstract: 利用一组国际政府债券数据，我构建了固定收益投资组合，其久期与相应本地股票市场指数的股息剥离久期相匹配。我发现，在过去半个世纪中，这些债券投资组合的表现与股票对应物相当（甚至更好），同时表现出相似（甚至更高）的波动水平。这些结果为股权风险溢价和过度波动之谜（泡沫）提供了新的视角。我提出了几种可能的解释，并进一步讨论了对宏观经济学、货币经济学、资产定价和公司金融的含义。
27367.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, ME；JEL：E2, E21, E4, G1, G11, G12, G15, G31, G32, G5, G52, O4

27366.title: Inequality, Fiscal Policy and COVID19 Restrictions in a Demand-Determined Economy
27366.zh_title: 不平等、财政政策与COVID-19限制措施在一个需求决定的经济体中的影响
27366.authors: Alan J. Auerbach, Yuriy Gorodnichenko, Daniel Murphy
27366.abstract: We evaluate the effects of inequality, fiscal policy, and COVID19 restrictions in a model of economic slack with potentially rigid capital operating costs. Inequality has large negative effects on output, while also diminishing the effects of demand-side fiscal stimulus. COVID restrictions can reduce current-period GDP by more than is directly associated with the restrictions themselves when rigid capital costs induce firm exit. Higher inequality is associated with larger restriction multipliers. The effectiveness of fiscal policies depends on inequality and the joint distribution of capital operating costs and firm revenues. Furthermore, COVID19 restrictions can cause future inflation, as households tilt their expenditure toward the future.
27366.zh_abstract: 我们在一个存在经济松弛且资本运营成本可能刚性的模型中，评估了不平等、财政政策和COVID-19限制措施的影响。不平等对产出有显著的负面效应，同时也会削弱需求侧财政刺激的效果。当刚性资本成本导致企业退出时，COVID-19限制措施对当期GDP的减少可能超过限制措施本身的直接关联效应。更高的不平等与更大的限制乘数相关。财政政策的有效性取决于不平等程度以及资本运营成本与企业收入的联合分布。此外，COVID-19限制措施可能导致未来通胀，因为家庭将支出向未来倾斜。

27365.title: Global Lessons from Climate Change Legislation and Litigation
27365.zh_title: 气候变化立法与诉讼的全球经验
27365.authors: Shaikh M. Eskander, Sam Fankhauser, Joana Setzer
27365.abstract: There is no country in the world that does not have at least one law or policy dealing with climate change. The most prolific countries have well over 20, and globally there are 1,800 such laws. Some of them are executive orders or policies issued by governments, others are legislative acts passed by parliament. The judiciary has been involved in 1,500 court cases that concern climate change (over 1,100 of which in the US). We use Climate Change Laws of the World (CCLW), a publicly accessible database, to analyze patterns and trends in climate change legislation and litigation over the past 30 years. The data reveal that global legislative activity peaked around 2009-14, well before the Paris Agreement. Accounting for effectiveness in implementation and the length of time laws have been in place, the UK and South Korea are the most comprehensive legislators among G20 countries and Spain within the OECD. Climate change legislation is less of a partisan issue than is commonly assumed: the number of climate laws passed by governments of the left, center and right is roughly proportional to their time in office. We also find that legislative activity decreases in times of economic difficulty. Where courts have got involved, judges outside the US have ruled in favor of enhanced climate protection in about half of the cases (US judges are more inclined to rule against climate protection).
27365.zh_abstract: 世界上每个国家都至少有一项应对气候变化的法律或政策。立法最活跃的国家拥有超过20项此类法律，全球共有1800项。其中一些是政府发布的行政命令或政策，另一些是议会通过的立法法案。司法机构已介入1500起与气候变化相关的法庭案件（其中超过1100起发生在美国）。我们利用公开数据库“世界气候变化法律”（CCLW），分析了过去30年气候变化立法与诉讼的模式和趋势。数据显示，全球立法活动在2009年至2014年左右达到顶峰，远早于《巴黎协定》。考虑到实施效果和法律生效时长，英国和韩国是G20国家中立法最全面的，西班牙则是OECD国家中最全面的。气候变化立法并不像通常认为的那样具有党派分歧：左翼、中间派和右翼政府通过的气候法律数量大致与其执政时间成正比。我们还发现，立法活动在经济困难时期会减少。在法院介入的案件中，美国以外的法官在大约一半的案件中支持加强气候保护（美国法官更倾向于反对气候保护）。

27364.title: Building Resilient Health Systems: Experimental Evidence from Sierra Leone and the 2014 Ebola Outbreak
27364.zh_title: 建设有韧性的卫生系统：来自塞拉利昂和2014年埃博拉疫情的实验证据
27364.authors: Darin Christensen, Oeindrila Dube, Johannes Haushofer, Bilal Siddiqi, Maarten J. Voors
27364.abstract: Underuse of health systems and a lack of confidence in their quality contribute to high rates of mortality in the developing world. How individuals perceive health systems may be especially critical during epidemics, when they choose whether to cooperate with response efforts and frontline health workers. Can improving the perceived quality of healthcare promote community health and ultimately, help to contain epidemics? We leverage a field experiment to answer this question in the context of Sierra Leone and the 2014 West Africa Ebola crisis. Two years before the outbreak, we randomly assigned two accountability interventions to government-run health clinics – one focused on community monitoring and the other conferred non-financial awards to clinic staff. These interventions delivered immediate benefits under "normal" conditions. Even prior to the Ebola crisis, both interventions increased clinic utilization and satisfaction with healthcare, and community monitoring additionally improved child health, leading to 38 percent fewer deaths of children under five. Later, during the crisis, the interventions also increased reporting of Ebola cases by 62 percent, and significantly reduced Ebola-related deaths. Evidence on mechanisms suggests that the interventions improved confidence in the health system, encouraging patients to report Ebola symptoms and receive medical care. These results indicate that promoting accountability not only has the power to improve health systems during normal times, but can also make them more resilient to crises that emerge over the longer run.
27364.zh_abstract: 卫生系统利用不足以及对其质量缺乏信心，是导致发展中国家高死亡率的原因之一。个人对卫生系统的看法在疫情期间可能尤为关键，因为他们需要决定是否配合应对工作并与一线卫生工作者合作。改善医疗服务的感知质量能否促进社区健康并最终帮助控制疫情？我们利用一项实地实验，在塞拉利昂和2014年西非埃博拉危机的背景下回答这个问题。疫情爆发前两年，我们对政府运营的诊所随机分配了两种问责干预措施——一种侧重于社区监督，另一种向诊所工作人员提供非金钱奖励。这些干预措施在“正常”条件下立即带来了好处。甚至在埃博拉危机之前，两种干预措施都提高了诊所利用率和医疗满意度，而社区监督还改善了儿童健康，使五岁以下儿童死亡率降低了38%。后来，在危机期间，这些干预措施还将埃博拉病例的报告率提高了62%，并显著减少了与埃博拉相关的死亡。关于机制的证据表明，这些干预措施增强了对卫生系统的信心，鼓励患者报告埃博拉症状并接受医疗护理。这些结果表明，促进问责制不仅能在正常时期改善卫生系统，还能使其在面对长期出现的危机时更具韧性。

27363.title: Tax Policy and Abnormal Investment Behavior
27363.zh_title: 税收政策与异常投资行为
27363.abstract: This paper studies tax-minimizing investment, whereby firms tilt capital purchases toward fiscal year-end to reduce taxes. Between 1984 and 2016, average investment in fiscal Q4 exceeds the fiscal Q1 through Q3 average by 36%. Q4 spikes occur in the U.S. and internationally. We use this behavior to characterize the mechanisms through which taxes affect corporate investment behavior. Research designs using variation in firm tax positions from administrative data and tax policy changes confirm that tax minimization causes spikes. Spikes increase when firms face financial constraints or higher option values of waiting until fiscal year-end, and cumulative investment levels do not completely reverse after spikes. We develop an investmentmodel with tax asymmetries to rationalize these patterns. In themodel, both a depreciation motive—late-year investments face lower effective tax rates—and an option value motive—tax asymmetry implies time-varying opportunities to minimize taxes—are necessary to fit the data. We document and discuss implications of investment spikes for capital goods suppliers, lenders, and stimulus policy design.
27363.zh_abstract: 本文研究了旨在减少税收的投资行为，即企业将资本购买倾斜至财政年度末以降低税负。在1984年至2016年间，财政第四季度的平均投资比第一至第三季度的平均水平高出36%。第四季度的投资峰值在美国和国际上均有出现。我们利用这种行为来刻画税收影响企业投资行为的机制。利用行政数据中企业税收状况的变化以及税收政策变化的研究设计，证实了税收最小化导致了投资峰值。当企业面临财务约束或等待至财政年度末的期权价值更高时，投资峰值会增加，并且峰值后的累计投资水平不会完全逆转。我们开发了一个包含税收不对称性的投资模型来解释这些模式。在该模型中，折旧动机（年末投资面临较低的有效税率）和期权价值动机（税收不对称意味着存在随时间变化的税收最小化机会）对于拟合数据都是必要的。我们记录并讨论了投资峰值对资本品供应商、贷款机构和刺激政策设计的影响。
27363.meta: Programs：CF, EFG, PE；JEL：D21, D22, D92, G31, H25, H32

27362.title: Determinants of Small Business Reopening Decisions After COVID Restrictions Were Lifted
27362.zh_title: COVID-19限制解除后小企业重新开业决策的决定因素
27362.authors: Dylan Balla-Elliott, Zoë B. Cullen, Edward L. Glaeser, Michael Luca, Christopher T. Stanton
27362.abstract: The COVID-19 pandemic led to dramatic economic disruptions, including government-imposed restrictions that required millions of American businesses to temporarily close. We present three main facts about business decisions to reopen at the end of the lockdown, using a nation-wide survey of thousands of small businesses. First, the plurality of firms reopened within days of the end of legal restrictions, suggesting that the lockdowns were generally binding for businesses - although a sizable minority delayed their reopening. Second, decisions to delay reopenings were not driven by public health concerns. Instead, businesses in high-proximity sectors planned to reopen more slowly because of expectations of stricter regulation rather than concerns about public health. Third, pessimistic demand projections played the primary role in explaining delays among firms that could legally reopen. Owners expected demand to be one-third lower than before the crisis throughout the pandemic. Using experimentally induced shocks to perceived demand, we find that a 10% decline in expected demand results in a 1.5 percentage point (8%) increase in the likelihood that firms expected to remain closed for at least one month after being legally able to open.
27362.zh_abstract: COVID-19疫情导致了剧烈的经济混乱，包括政府实施的限制措施，要求数百万美国企业暂时关闭。我们利用一项覆盖数千家小企业的全国性调查，提出了关于封锁结束时企业重新开业决策的三个主要事实。首先，多数企业在法律限制结束后的几天内重新开业，这表明封锁对企业普遍具有约束力——尽管有相当一部分企业推迟了重新开业。其次，推迟重新开业的决策并非由公共卫生担忧驱动。相反，高接触性行业的企业计划更慢地重新开业，是因为预期到更严格的监管，而非对公共卫生的担忧。第三，悲观的需求预期在解释那些可以合法重新开业的企业为何延迟方面发挥了主要作用。在整个疫情期间，业主预计需求将比危机前低三分之一。利用实验诱导的感知需求冲击，我们发现预期需求下降10%会导致企业在合法开业后至少一个月内仍预期关闭的可能性增加1.5个百分点（8%）。
27362.meta: Programs：EH, IO, LE, LS, PE, POL, PR；JEL：D22, E32, I15, L23

27361.title: To Pool or Not to Pool? Security Design in OTC Markets
27361.zh_title: 打包还是不打包？场外交易市场中的证券设计
27361.authors: Vincent Glode, Christian C. Opp, Ruslan Sverchkov
27361.abstract: We study security issuers' decision whether to pool assets when facing counterparties endowed with market power, as is common in over-the-counter markets. Unlike in competitive markets, pooling assets may be suboptimal in the presence of market power - both privately and socially - in particular, when the potential gains from trade are large. In these cases, pooling assets reduces the elasticity of trade volume in the relevant part of the payoff distribution, exacerbating inefficient rationing associated with the exercise of market power. Our results shed light on recently observed time-variation in the prevalence of pooling in financial markets.
27361.zh_abstract: 我们研究了证券发行人在面对拥有市场势力的交易对手时（这在场外交易市场中很常见）是否决定打包资产。与竞争性市场不同，在市场势力存在的情况下，打包资产可能在私人和社会层面都是次优的——特别是当潜在贸易收益很大时。在这些情况下，打包资产会降低相关收益分配部分中交易量的弹性，从而加剧与行使市场势力相关的低效配给。我们的研究结果揭示了近期观察到的金融市场中打包行为流行程度随时间变化的现象。

27360.title: EMEs and COVID-19: Shutting Down in a World of Informal and Tiny Firms
27360.zh_title: 新兴市场经济体与COVID-19：在一个充满非正规和小微企业的世界中实施封锁
27360.authors: Laura Alfaro, Oscar Becerra, Marcela Eslava
27360.abstract: Emerging economies are characterized by an extremely high prevalence of informality, small-firm employment and jobs not fit for working from home. These features factor into how the COVID-19 crisis has affected the economy. We develop a framework that, based on accounting identities and actual data, quantifies potential job and income losses during the crisis and recovery for economies with different economic organization structures. Our analysis incorporates differential exposure of jobs across categories of firm-size and formality status, as well as sectors and occupations. We account for the direct supply shock caused by lockdowns, the idiosyncratic demand shock suffered by sectors that rely on high contact with their costumers, the transmission of both shocks through IO linkages, and the overall aggregate demand effect derived from these shocks. Applying our framework to data for Colombia, which exhibits an employment distribution similar to that of other emerging market countries, in particular Latin America, we find that well over 50% of jobs are at risk in the initial stages of the crisis. Because informal jobs and those not fit for telework are at higher risk, this number goes down to 33% if the US employment distribution is imposed on the Colombian data. As the crisis deepens, the risk of unemployment grows. However, informality rebounds quickly in the recovery, an employment at risk is quickly reduced to 20% of the baseline, all concentrated in formal jobs. Our findings point to the importance of action to maintain formal matches from dissolving, given their scarcity and rebuilding difficulty, while protecting the poor and the informal via income transfers.
27360.zh_abstract: 新兴经济体的特点是非正规就业、小企业就业以及不适合居家办公的工作岗位极其普遍。这些特征影响了COVID-19危机对经济的影响方式。我们开发了一个框架，基于会计恒等式和实际数据，量化了危机期间和复苏过程中不同经济组织结构经济体潜在的就业和收入损失。我们的分析考虑了不同企业规模类别和正规性状态，以及行业和职业中就业岗位的差异化风险敞口。我们考虑了封锁造成的直接供给冲击、依赖高客户接触度行业遭受的特异性需求冲击、这两种冲击通过投入产出关联的传导，以及这些冲击导致的总体需求效应。将我们的框架应用于哥伦比亚的数据（其就业分布与其他新兴市场国家，特别是拉丁美洲国家相似），我们发现危机初期超过50%的就业岗位面临风险。由于非正规就业和不适于远程办公的岗位风险更高，如果将美国就业分布应用于哥伦比亚数据，这一数字将降至33%。随着危机加深，失业风险增加。然而，非正规就业在复苏中迅速反弹，面临风险的就业岗位迅速降至基线的20%，且全部集中在正规就业岗位。我们的研究结果表明，鉴于正规就业岗位的稀缺性和重建难度，采取行动防止其解体至关重要，同时通过收入转移来保护穷人和非正规就业者。

27359.title: Gender Differences in COVID-19 Related Attitudes and Behavior: Evidence from a Panel Survey in Eight OECD Countries
27359.zh_title: COVID-19相关态度与行为中的性别差异：来自八个OECD国家面板调查的证据
27359.authors: Vincenzo Galasso, Vincent Pons, Paola Profeta, Michael Becher, Sylvain Brouard, Martial Foucault
27359.abstract: Using original data from two waves of a survey conducted in March and April 2020 in eight OECD countries (N = 21,649), we show that women are more likely to see COVID-19 as a very serious health problem, to agree with restraining public policy measures adopted in response to it, and to comply with them. Gender differences in attitudes and behavior are substantial in all countries, robust to controlling for a large set of sociodemographic, employment, psychological, and behavioral factors, and only partially mitigated for individuals who cohabit or have direct exposure to COVID-19. The results are not driven by differential social desirability bias. They carry important implications for the spread of the pandemic and may contribute to explain gender differences in vulnerability to it.
27359.zh_abstract: 利用2020年3月和4月在八个OECD国家进行的两轮调查的原始数据（N = 21,649），我们表明女性更倾向于将COVID-19视为一个非常严重的健康问题，更同意为应对疫情而采取的约束性公共政策措施，并更遵守这些措施。态度和行为上的性别差异在所有国家都很大，并且在对大量社会人口、就业、心理和行为因素进行控制后依然稳健，对于同居或直接接触COVID-19的个体，这些差异仅得到部分缓解。结果并非由差异化的社会期望偏差驱动。这些发现对疫情的传播具有重要影响，并可能有助于解释性别在疫情脆弱性上的差异。

27358.title: The Effect of Foreclosures on Homeowners, Tenants, and Landlords
27358.zh_title: 止赎对房主、租户和房东的影响
27358.authors: Rebecca Diamond, Adam Guren, Rose Tan
27358.abstract: How costly is foreclosure? Estimates of the social cost of foreclosure typically focus on financial costs. Using random judge assignment instrumental variable (IV) and propensity score matching (PSM) approaches in Cook County, Illinois, we find evidence of significant non-pecuniary costs of foreclosure, particularly for foreclosed-upon homeowners. For all homeowners (IV and PSM), foreclosure causes housing instability, reduced homeownership, and financial distress. For marginal homeowners (IV) but not average homeowners (PSM), foreclosure also causes moves to worse neighborhoods and elevated divorce. We show that the difference between IV and PSM is due to treatment effect heterogeneity: marginal homeowners have more to lose than average homeowners. We find similar financial costs for landlords, although the non-financial effects we find for owners are absent. We find few negative effects for renters whose landlord forecloses. The contrast between our results for owners, renters, and landlords implies that the financial costs come from the financial loss while the non-financial costs for owners are due to a combination of eviction and financial loss rather than either individually. Our estimates imply that foreclosure is far more costly than current estimates imply, particularly for marginal cases that are most responsive to foreclosure mitigation policies, and that the costs are disproportionately borne by owners who lose their home.
27358.zh_abstract: 止赎的成本有多高？对止赎社会成本的估计通常集中于财务成本。利用伊利诺伊州库克县的随机法官分配工具变量法和倾向得分匹配法，我们发现了止赎存在显著的非金钱成本，尤其是对于被止赎的房主而言。对于所有房主（工具变量法和倾向得分匹配法），止赎会导致住房不稳定、自有住房率下降和财务困境。对于边缘房主（工具变量法），而非普通房主（倾向得分匹配法），止赎还会导致搬迁至更差的社区以及离婚率上升。我们表明，工具变量法和倾向得分匹配法之间的差异源于处理效应的异质性：边缘房主比普通房主损失更大。我们发现房东的财务成本相似，尽管我们为房主发现的非财务效应在房东身上并不存在。我们发现对于房东被止赎的租户而言，几乎没有负面效应。我们的结果在房主、租户和房东之间的对比表明，财务成本源于经济损失，而房主的非财务成本则是驱逐和经济损失共同作用的结果，而非其中任何一个单独因素。我们的估计表明，止赎的成本远高于当前估计所暗示的水平，尤其是对于那些对止赎缓解政策反应最敏感的边缘案例，并且这些成本不成比例地由失去房屋的房主承担。

27357.title: Geographic and Socioeconomic Heterogeneity in the Benefits of Reducing Air Pollution in the United States
27357.zh_title: 美国减少空气污染收益的地理和社会经济异质性
27357.authors: Tatyana Deryugina, Nolan H. Miller, David Molitor, Julian Reif
27357.abstract: Policies aimed at reducing the harmful effects of air pollution exposure typically focus on areas with high levels of pollution. However, if a population’s vulnerability to air pollution is imperfectly correlated with current pollution levels, then this approach to air quality regulation may not efficiently target pollution reduction efforts. We examine the geographic and socioeconomic determinants of vulnerability to dying from acute exposure to fine particulate matter (PM2.5) pollution. We find that there is substantial local and regional variability in the share of individuals who are vulnerable to pollution both at the county and ZIP code level. Vulnerability tends to be negatively related to health and socioeconomic status. Surprisingly, we find that vulnerability is also negatively related to an area’s average PM2.5 pollution level, suggesting that basing air quality regulation only on current pollution levels may fail to effectively target regions with the most to gain by reducing exposure.
27357.zh_abstract: 旨在减少空气污染暴露有害影响的政策通常侧重于污染水平较高的地区。然而，如果人群对空气污染的脆弱性与当前污染水平并非完全相关，那么这种空气质量监管方法可能无法有效地针对减排努力。我们考察了因急性暴露于细颗粒物污染而死亡脆弱性的地理和社会经济决定因素。我们发现，在县和邮政编码层面，脆弱人群的比例存在显著的地方和区域差异。脆弱性往往与健康状况和社会经济地位呈负相关。令人惊讶的是，我们发现脆弱性也与一个地区的平均细颗粒物污染水平呈负相关，这表明仅基于当前污染水平的空气质量监管可能无法有效针对那些通过减少暴露获益最大的地区。
27357.meta: Programs：AG, EEE, EH, PE；JEL：I14, Q53, Q56

27356.title: The Impacts of a Prototypical Home Visiting Program on Child Skills
27356.zh_title: 一个典型家访项目对儿童技能的影响
27356.authors: James J. Heckman, Bei Liu, Mai Lu, Jin Zhou
27356.abstract: This paper develops a new framework for estimating the causal impacts on child skills and the mechanisms producing these impacts using data from a randomized control study of a widely evaluated early-childhood home visiting program. We show the feasibility of replicating the program at scale. We report estimates from standard procedures for reporting treatment effects as unweighted averages item scores and compare them with estimates adjusting for item difficulties. Such adjustments produce more interpretable estimates. We go beyond treatment effects and estimate individual-specific latent skills, comparing treatment and control skills and their impacts on test scores.
27356.zh_abstract: 本文利用一个被广泛评估的幼儿家访项目的随机对照研究数据，建立了一个新的框架来估计对儿童技能的因果影响以及产生这些影响的机制。我们展示了大规模复制该项目的可行性。我们报告了标准程序下将处理效应报告为项目分数未加权平均值的估计值，并将其与根据项目难度调整后的估计值进行比较。这种调整产生了更具可解释性的估计值。我们超越了处理效应，估计了特定个体的潜在技能，比较了处理组和对照组的技能及其对测试分数的影响。

27355.title: Corporate Bond Liquidity During the COVID-19 Crisis
27355.zh_title: COVID-19危机期间的公司债券流动性
27355.authors: Mahyar Kargar, Benjamin Lester, David Lindsay, Shuo Liu, Pierre-Olivier Weill, Diego Zúñiga
27355.abstract: We study liquidity conditions in the corporate bond market during the COVID-19 pandemic. We document that the cost of trading immediately via risky-principal trades increased dramatically at the height of the sell-off, forcing customers to shift towards slower, agency trades. Exploiting eligibility requirements, we show that the Federal Reserve’s corporate credit facilities had a positive effect on market liquidity. A structural estimation reveals that customers’ willingness to pay for immediacy increased by about 200 bps per dollar of transaction, but quickly subsided after the Fed announced its interventions. Dealers’ marginal cost also increased substantially, but did not fully subside.
27355.zh_abstract: 我们研究了COVID-19大流行期间公司债券市场的流动性状况。我们记录了在抛售高峰期，通过风险本金交易立即交易的成本急剧上升，迫使客户转向更慢的代理交易。利用资格要求，我们表明美联储的公司信贷便利对市场流动性产生了积极影响。一项结构性估计显示，客户为即时性支付的意愿每美元交易增加了约200个基点，但在美联储宣布干预后迅速消退。交易商的边际成本也大幅增加，但并未完全消退。
27355.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, ME；JEL：E5, E58, E65, G0, G01, G12, G21, G23

27354.title: The search theory of OTC markets
27354.zh_title: 场外交易市场的搜寻理论
27354.abstract: I review the recent literature that applies search-and-matching theory to the study of Over-the-Counter (OTC) financial markets. I formulate and solve a simple model in order to illustrate the typical assumptions and economic forces at play in existing work. I then offer thematic tours of the literature and, in the process, discuss avenues for future research.
27354.zh_abstract: 我回顾了近期将搜寻与匹配理论应用于场外金融市场研究的文献。我构建并求解了一个简单模型，以说明现有研究中典型的假设和经济力量。然后，我对文献进行了主题性梳理，并在此过程中讨论了未来研究的途径。

27353.title: Corporate Culture as a Theory of the Firm
27353.zh_title: 作为企业理论的企业文化
27353.authors: Gary B. Gorton, Alexander K. Zentefis
27353.abstract: Markets and firms offer contrasting methods to arrange production. In markets, contracts govern the purchase of parts and services that compose production. In firms, the shared values, customs, and norms coming from a corporate culture govern employees’ joint development of those parts and services. We argue for this distinction as a theory of the firm. Firms exist because corporate culture at times is more efficient at carrying out production than detailed contracts. The firm’s boundary encircles the parts of production for which a manager optimally chooses corporate culture as the organizing device. The model can explain why some mergers and acquisitions fail, in a way consistent with empirical evidence, and why corporate cultures are hard to change.
27353.zh_abstract: 市场和企业提供了组织生产的对比方法。在市场中，合同管理着构成生产的零部件和服务的采购。在企业中，来自企业文化的共享价值观、习俗和规范管理着员工对这些零部件和服务的联合开发。我们认为这种区别是一种企业理论。企业之所以存在，是因为企业文化有时比详细的合同更有效地进行生产。企业的边界围绕着生产的一部分，管理者为此最优地选择企业文化作为组织工具。该模型可以解释为什么一些并购会失败，这与经验证据一致，以及为什么企业文化难以改变。

27352.title: Inflation with Covid Consumption Baskets
27352.zh_title: 新冠疫情消费篮子下的通货膨胀
27352.abstract: The Covid-19 Pandemic has led to changes in consumer expenditure patterns that can introduce significant bias in the measurement of inflation. I use data collected from credit and debit transactions in the US to update the official basket weights and estimate the impact on the Consumer Price Index (CPI). I find that the Covid inflation rate is higher than the official CPI in the US, for both headline and core indices. I also find similar results with Covid baskets in 10 out of 16 additional countries. The difference is significant and growing over time, as social-distancing rules and behaviors are making consumers spend relatively more on food and other categories with rising inflation, and relatively less on transportation and other categories experiencing significant deflation.
27352.zh_abstract: 新冠疫情导致了消费者支出模式的改变，这可能会给通货膨胀的衡量带来显著偏差。我利用从美国信用卡和借记卡交易中收集的数据来更新官方篮子权重，并估计对消费者价格指数的影响。我发现，无论是总体指数还是核心指数，美国的疫情通胀率都高于官方消费者价格指数。我还在另外16个国家中的10个国家中发现了类似的结果，即使用疫情篮子。这种差异显著且随时间推移而扩大，因为社交距离规则和行为使得消费者相对更多地支出于食品和其他通胀上升的类别，而相对更少地支出于交通和其他经历显著通缩的类别。

27351.title: Universal Basic Income: A Dynamic Assessment
27351.zh_title: 全民基本收入：一项动态评估
27351.abstract: Universal basic income (UBI) is an increasingly popular policy proposal but there is no evidence regarding its longer-term consequences. We study UBI in a general equilibrium model with imperfect capital markets, labor market shocks, and intergenerational linkages via skill formation and transfers. We find that UBI increases-welfare for older agents but has large-welfare losses for younger agents and future generations. A sizable share of the negative effects stem from the endogenous intergenerational linkages. Modeling automation as an increased probability of an “out-of-work” shock, the model provides insights on the changing welfare consequence of UBI in a riskier environment.
27351.zh_abstract: 全民基本收入是一个日益流行的政策提议，但尚无关于其长期后果的证据。我们在一个具有不完善资本市场、劳动力市场冲击以及通过技能形成和代际转移产生代际联系的一般均衡模型中研究全民基本收入。我们发现，全民基本收入增加了老年代理人的福利，但对年轻代理人和未来世代造成了巨大的福利损失。负面效应的相当一部分源于内生的代际联系。将自动化建模为“失业”冲击概率的增加，该模型为在风险更高环境下全民基本收入福利后果的变化提供了见解。
27351.meta: Programs：DEV, ED, EFG, LS, POL；JEL：H24, H31, I38, J24

27350.title: Global Trade and Margins of Productivity in Agriculture
27350.zh_title: 全球贸易与农业生产率边际
27350.abstract: We study the effects of globalization on agricultural productivity across countries. We develop a multi-country general equilibrium model that incorporates choices of crops and technologies in agricultural production at the micro-level of fields covering the surface of the earth. We estimate our model using field-level data on potential yields of crops under different technologies characterized by factor and input intensity. We evaluate the welfare and productivity gains from reductions in trade costs of agricultural outputs and inputs across countries between 1980 and 2015. In addition to gains from international crop specialization, we find notable gains from access to foreign agricultural inputs. This mechanism operates through a shift from traditional (labor-intensive) technologies to modern (input-intensive) ones.
27350.zh_abstract: 我们研究了全球化对各国农业生产率的影响。我们构建了一个多国一般均衡模型，该模型在地球表面田地的微观层面纳入了农作物选择和生产技术选择。我们利用不同技术下（以要素和投入强度为特征）农作物潜在产量的田地级数据来估计模型。我们评估了1980年至2015年间各国农产品和投入品贸易成本降低所带来的福利和生产率提升。除了国际农作物专业化带来的收益外，我们发现获取外国农业投入品也带来了显著收益。这一机制通过从传统（劳动密集型）技术向现代（投入密集型）技术的转变而发挥作用。
27350.meta: Programs：IFM, ITI, PR, TWP；JEL：F10, F14, F60, Q16, R14

27349.title: How and When to Use the Political Cycle to Identify Advertising Effects
27349.zh_title: 如何以及何时利用政治周期识别广告效应
27349.authors: Sarah Moshary, Bradley T. Shapiro, Jihong Song
27349.abstract: A central challenge in estimating the causal effect of TV advertising on demand is isolating quasi-random variation in advertising. Political advertising, which topped $\$14$ billion in expenditures in 2016, has been proposed as a plausible source of such variation and thus a candidate for an instrumental variable. We provide a critical evaluation of how and where this instrument is valid and useful across categories. We characterize the conditions under which political cycles theoretically identify the causal effect of TV advertising on demand, highlight threats to the exclusion restriction and monotonicity condition, and suggest a specification to address the most serious concerns. We test the strength of the first stage category-by-category for 274 product categories. For most categories, weak-instrument robust inference is recommended, as first-stage F-statistics are less than 10 for 221 of 274 product categories in our benchmark specification. The largest first-stage F-statistics occur in categories that typically advertise locally, such as automobile dealerships and restaurants. Failure to use the suggested specification leads to results that suggest violations of exclusion and monotonicity in a significant number of categories. Finally, we conduct a case study of the auto industry. Despite a very strong first stage, the IV estimate for this category is imprecise.
27349.zh_abstract: 估计电视广告对需求的因果效应的核心挑战在于隔离广告的准随机变化。政治广告（2016年支出超过140亿美元）被认为是这种变化的可能来源，因此可作为工具变量的候选。我们对该工具在不同类别中的有效性和实用性进行了批判性评估。我们描述了政治周期在理论上识别电视广告对需求因果效应的条件，强调了排他性约束和单调性条件面临的威胁，并提出了一个解决最严重问题的规范。我们对274个产品类别逐一检验了第一阶段的强度。对于大多数类别，建议使用弱工具变量稳健推断，因为在我们基准规范中，274个产品类别中有221个的第一阶段F统计量小于10。最大的第一阶段F统计量出现在通常进行本地广告的类别中，例如汽车经销商和餐馆。未能使用建议的规范会导致结果在大量类别中暗示违反排他性和单调性。最后，我们对汽车行业进行了案例研究。尽管第一阶段非常强，但该类别的IV估计并不精确。
27349.meta: Programs：IO, POL；JEL：C01, C26, C36, L0, L62, M3, M37

27348.title: Old Age Risks, Consumption, and Insurance
27348.authors: Richard Blundell, Margherita Borella, Jeanne Commault, Mariacristina De Nardi
27348.abstract: In the U.S, after age 65, households face income and health risks and a large fraction of these risks are transitory. While consumption significantly responds to transitory income shocks, out-of-pocket medical expenses do not. In contrast, both consumption and out-of-pocket medical expenses respond to transitory health shocks. Thus, most U.S. elderly keep their out-of-pocket medical expenses close to a satiation point that varies with health. Consumption responds to health shocks mostly because adverse health shocks reduce the marginal utility of consumption. The effect of health on marginal utility changes the optimal transfers due to health shocks.
27348.zh_abstract: 在美国，65岁以后，家庭面临收入和健康风险，且这些风险中有很大一部分是暂时性的。虽然消费对暂时性收入冲击有显著反应，但自付医疗费用却没有。相比之下，消费和自付医疗费用都对暂时性健康冲击有反应。因此，大多数美国老年人将其自付医疗费用保持在接近一个随健康状况变化的饱和点。消费对健康冲击做出反应，主要是因为不利的健康冲击降低了消费的边际效用。健康对边际效用的影响改变了因健康冲击而产生的最优转移支付。
27348.meta: Programs：AG, EH, PE；JEL：D1, D11, D12, D14, E2, E21, H2, H31, H51

27347.title: Deciphering the Macroeconomic Effects of Internal Devaluations in a Monetary Union
27347.zh_title: 解读货币联盟内部贬值的宏观经济效应
27347.authors: Javier Andrés, Óscar Arce, Jesús Fernández-Villaverde, Samuel Hurtado
27347.abstract: We study the macroeconomic effects of internal devaluations undertaken by a periphery of countries belonging to a monetary union. We find that internal devaluations have large and positive output effects in the long run. Through an expectations channel, most of these effects carry over to the short run. Internal devaluations focused on goods markets reforms are generally more powerful in stimulating growth than reforms aimed at moderating wages, but the latter are less deflationary. For a monetary union with a periphery the size of the euro area's, the countries at the periphery benefit from internal devaluations even at the zero lower bound (ZLB) of the nominal interest rate. Nevertheless, when the ZLB binds, there is a case for a sequencing of reforms that prioritizes labor policies over goods markets reforms.
27347.zh_abstract: 我们研究了货币联盟中外围国家进行内部贬值的宏观经济效应。我们发现，内部贬值在长期内具有巨大且正向的产出效应。通过预期渠道，这些效应大部分会传导至短期。侧重于商品市场改革的内部贬值在刺激增长方面通常比旨在缓和工资的改革更有效，但后者通缩程度较低。对于一个外围国家规模与欧元区相当的货币联盟，即使在名义利率零下限（ZLB）下，外围国家也能从内部贬值中受益。然而，当ZLB具有约束力时，存在一种优先考虑劳动力政策而非商品市场改革的改革顺序安排。

27346.title: Information and the Acquisition of Social Network Connections
27346.zh_title: 信息与社会网络连接的获取
27346.authors: Toman Barsbai, Victoria Licuanan, Andreas Steinmayr, Erwin Tiongson, Dean Yang
27346.abstract: How do information interventions affect individual efforts to expand social networks? We study a randomized controlled trial of a program providing information on settling in the U.S. for new immigrants from the Philippines. Improved information leads new immigrants to acquire fewer new social network connections. Treated immigrants make 16-28 percent fewer new friends and acquaintances and are 65 percent less likely to receive support from organizations of fellow immigrants. The treatment has no effect on employment, wellbeing, or other outcomes. Consistent with a simple model, the treatment reduces social network links more in places likely to have lower costs of acquiring network links (those with more prior fellow immigrants). Information and social network links appear to be substitutes in this context: better-informed immigrants invest less in expanding their social networks upon arrival. Our results suggest that endogenous reductions in acquisition of social network connections can reduce the effectiveness of information interventions.
27346.zh_abstract: 信息干预如何影响个人扩大社交网络的努力？我们研究了一项为菲律宾新移民提供在美国定居信息的随机对照试验。改善的信息导致新移民获得更少的新社交网络连接。受干预的移民结交的新朋友和熟人数减少了16-28%，从移民同胞组织获得支持的可能性降低了65%。该干预对就业、幸福感或其他结果没有影响。与一个简单模型一致，该干预在可能具有较低网络连接获取成本的地方（即先前移民同胞较多的地方）减少了更多的社交网络连接。在这种情况下，信息和社交网络连接似乎是替代品：信息更充分的移民在抵达后对扩大社交网络的投资较少。我们的结果表明，社交网络连接获取的内生性减少可能会降低信息干预的有效性。

27345.title: The Rise of US Earnings Inequality: Does the Cycle Drive the Trend?
27345.zh_title: 美国收入不平等加剧：周期驱动趋势吗？
27345.authors: Jonathan Heathcote, Fabrizio Perri, Giovanni L. Violante
27345.abstract: We document that declining hours worked are the primary driver of widening inequality in the bottom half of the male labor earnings distribution in the United States over the past 52 years. This decline in hours is heavily concentrated in recessions: hours and earnings at the bottom fall sharply in recessions and do not fully recover in subsequent expansions. Motivated by this evidence, we build a structural model to explore the possibility that recessions cause persistent increases in inequality; that is, that the cycle drives the trend. The model features skill-biased technical change, which implies a trend decline in low-skill wages relative to the value of non-market activities. With this adverse trend in the background, recessions imply a potential double-whammy for low skilled men. This group is disproportionately likely to experience unemployment, which further reduces skills and potential earnings via a scarring effect. As unemployed low skilled men give up job search, recessions generate surges in non-participation. Because non-participation is highly persistent, earnings inequality remains elevated long after the recession ends.
27345.zh_abstract: 我们记录了在过去52年中，工作时间减少是美国男性劳动收入分布下半部分不平等加剧的主要驱动因素。工作时间的减少高度集中在经济衰退期：底部群体的工作时间和收入在经济衰退中急剧下降，并在随后的扩张中未能完全恢复。受此证据启发，我们构建了一个结构模型来探讨经济衰退导致不平等持续加剧的可能性；即周期驱动趋势。该模型以技能偏向型技术变革为特征，这意味着低技能工资相对于非市场活动价值存在趋势性下降。在这种不利趋势的背景下，经济衰退对低技能男性意味着潜在的双重打击。该群体不成比例地经历失业，这通过疤痕效应进一步降低了技能和潜在收入。随着失业的低技能男性放弃求职，经济衰退导致非参与率激增。由于非参与具有高度持续性，收入不平等在经济衰退结束后很长时间内仍然居高不下。
27345.meta: Programs：EFG, LS；JEL：E24, E32, J24, J31, J64, J65

27344.title: COVID-19 and Remote Work: An Early Look at US Data
27344.zh_title: COVID-19与远程工作：美国数据的初步观察
27344.authors: Erik Brynjolfsson, John J. Horton, Adam Ozimek, Daniel Rock, Garima Sharma, Hong-Yi TuYe
27344.abstract: We report the results of a nationally-representative sample of the US population during the COVID-19 pandemic. The survey ran in two waves from April 1-5, 2020 and May 2-8, 2020. Of those employed pre-COVID-19, we find that about half are now working from home, including 35.2% who report they were commuting and recently switched to working from home. In addition, 10.1% report being laid-off or furloughed since the start of COVID-19. There is a strong negative relationship between the fraction in a state still commuting to work and the fraction working from home. We find that the share of people switching to remote work can be predicted by the incidence of COVID-19 and that younger people were more likely to switch to remote work. Furthermore, states with a higher share of employment in information work including management, professional and related occupations were more likely to shift toward working from home and had fewer people laid off or furloughed. We find no substantial change in results between the two waves, suggesting that most changes to remote work manifested by early April.
27344.zh_abstract: 我们报告了COVID-19疫情期间美国全国代表性样本的调查结果。该调查分两轮进行，分别为2020年4月1日至5日和2020年5月2日至8日。在COVID-19前有工作的人中，我们发现约有一半现在在家工作，其中35.2%的人报告他们之前通勤，最近转为在家工作。此外，10.1%的人报告自COVID-19开始以来被解雇或暂时停职。各州仍在通勤上班的人口比例与在家工作的人口比例之间存在强烈的负相关关系。我们发现，转向远程工作的人口比例可以通过COVID-19的发病率来预测，并且年轻人更有可能转向远程工作。此外，在管理、专业及相关职业等信息工作就业份额较高的州，更倾向于转向在家工作，且被解雇或暂时停职的人数较少。我们发现两轮调查结果之间没有实质性变化，这表明大多数远程工作的变化在4月初就已显现。
27344.meta: Programs：IO, LS, PR；JEL：I15, J21, L23, M15, M5

27399.title: Managing Households' Expectations with Unconventional Policies
27399.zh_title: 通过非常规政策管理家庭预期
27399.authors: Francesco D’Acunto, Daniel Hoang, Michael Weber
27399.abstract: With a binding effective lower bound on interest rates and large government deficits, conventional policies are unviable and policymakers resort to unconventional policies, which target households' expectations directly. Using unique micro data and a difference-in-differences strategy, we assess the effectiveness of unconventional fiscal policy and forward guidance, both of which aim to stimulate consumption via raising households' inflation expectations. All households' inflation expectations and spending plans react to unconventional fiscal policy. Instead, households, contrary to experts, do not react to forward guidance. We argue that policies aiming to affect households directly are ineffective if (non-expert) households do not understand them.
27399.zh_abstract: 在利率面临有效下限且政府赤字庞大的情况下，传统政策不可行，政策制定者转而采用直接针对家庭预期的非常规政策。利用独特的微观数据和双重差分策略，我们评估了非常规财政政策和前瞻性指引的有效性，这两者都旨在通过提高家庭的通胀预期来刺激消费。所有家庭的通胀预期和支出计划都对非常规财政政策做出反应。相反，与专家不同，家庭对前瞻性指引没有反应。我们认为，如果（非专家）家庭不理解这些政策，那么旨在直接影响家庭的政策是无效的。
27399.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, ME；JEL：D12, D84, D91, E21, E31, E52, E65

27398.title: The Growth of Nations Revisited: Global Environmental Accounting from 1998 to 2018.
27398.zh_title: 国家增长再探：1998年至2018年的全球环境核算
27398.authors: Aniruddh Mohan, Nicholas Z. Muller, Akshay Thyagarajan, Randall V. Martin, Melanie S. Hammer, Aaron van Donkelaar
27398.abstract: A persistent issue in environmental economics is whether growth is sustainable. Pollution is a key driver of sustainability, which we define as an economy exhibiting falling pollution damages at its balanced growth path. We deduct air pollution and carbon dioxide damages from the national accounts for 163 countries between 1998 and 2018. Global pollution intensity fell from 1998 to 2008, remaining flat thereafter. China highlights the importance of defining sustainability in terms of damages; between 2011 and 2018, physical measures of environmental quality improved, but monetary damage increased by 50 percent. Sustainability based on emissions ignores this rise in damage.
27398.zh_abstract: 环境经济学中的一个持续问题是增长是否可持续。污染是可持续性的关键驱动因素，我们将可持续性定义为一个经济体在其平衡增长路径上表现出下降的污染损害。我们扣除了1998年至2018年间163个国家的国民账户中的空气污染和二氧化碳损害。全球污染强度从1998年到2008年下降，此后保持平稳。中国凸显了以损害来定义可持续性的重要性；在2011年至2018年间，环境质量的物理指标有所改善，但货币损害增加了50%。基于排放的可持续性忽视了这种损害的上升。
27398.meta: Programs：EEE, EFG；JEL：E13, Q51, Q53, Q54, Q56

27397.title: What Accounts for the Rising Share of Women in the Top 1%?
27397.zh_title: 是什么导致了女性在收入前1%群体中占比的上升？
27397.authors: Richard V. Burkhauser, Nicolas Hérault, Stephen P. Jenkins, Roger Wilkins
27397.abstract: The share of women in the top 1% of the UK’s income distribution has been growing over the last two decades (as in several other countries). Our first contribution is to account for this secular change using regressions of the probability of being in the top 1%, fitted separately for men and women, in order to contrast between the sexes the role of changes in characteristics and changes in returns to characteristics. We show that the rise of women in the top 1% is primarily accounted for by their greater increases (relative to men) in the number of years spent in full-time education. Although most top income analysis uses tax return data, we derive our findings taking advantage of the much more extensive information about personal characteristics that is available in survey data. Our use of survey data requires justification given survey under-coverage of top incomes. Providing this justification is our second contribution.
27397.zh_abstract: 在过去二十年中，英国收入分配前1%群体中女性的比例一直在增长（其他几个国家也是如此）。我们的第一个贡献是，通过分别对男性和女性拟合进入前1%概率的回归，来解释这种长期变化，以便对比性别之间特征变化和特征回报变化所起的作用。我们表明，女性在前1%群体中占比的上升，主要归因于她们（相对于男性）在全日制教育年限上的更大增长。尽管大多数高收入分析使用纳税申报数据，但我们利用调查数据中可获得的关于个人特征的更广泛信息得出了我们的发现。鉴于调查数据对高收入的覆盖不足，使用调查数据需要理由。提供这一理由是我们的第二个贡献。

27396.title: Predictable Financial Crises
27396.authors: Robin Greenwood, Samuel G. Hanson, Andrei Shleifer, Jakob Ahm Sørensen
27396.abstract: Using historical data on post-war financial crises around the world, we show that crises are substantially predictable. The combination of rapid credit and asset price growth over the prior three years, whether in the nonfinancial business or the household sector, is associated with about a 40% probability of entering a financial crisis within the next three years. This compares with a roughly 7% probability in normal times, when neither credit nor asset price growth has been elevated. Our evidence cuts against the view that financial crises are unpredictable “bolts from the sky” and points toward the Kindleberger-Minsky view that crises are the byproduct of predictable, boom-bust credit cycles. The predictability we document favors macro-financial policies that “lean against the wind” of credit market booms.
27396.zh_abstract: 利用全球战后金融危机的历史数据，我们表明金融危机在很大程度上是可预测的。无论发生在非金融企业部门还是家庭部门，过去三年内信贷和资产价格的快速增长组合，与未来三年内进入金融危机的概率约为40%相关。相比之下，在信贷和资产价格增长均未升高的正常时期，这一概率大约为7%。我们的证据反驳了金融危机是不可预测的“晴天霹雳”的观点，并支持金德尔伯格-明斯基的观点，即危机是可预测的繁荣-萧条信贷周期的副产品。我们所记录的可预测性，有利于采取“逆信贷市场繁荣之风而行”的宏观金融政策。
27396.meta: Programs：AP, CF, ME；JEL：E44, E7, G01, G4

27395.title: Aggregate Effects from Public Works: Evidence from India
27395.zh_title: 公共工程的总体效应：来自印度的证据
27395.abstract: This paper explores the aggregate economic effects from India's National Rural Employment Guarantee Scheme (NREGS), which provides up to 100 days of labor to rural laborers at the mandated minimum wage. We examine the within-district change to night-time lights and banking deposits using the staggered program rollout for identification. We find consistent and robust evidence that NREGS increased aggregate economic output by 1-2% per capita measured by night-time lights. This effect, however, is not equal across districts. We observe no positive effect of the program in poorer districts, illuminating an important source of heterogeneity.
27395.zh_abstract: 本文探讨了印度全国农村就业保障计划（NREGS）的总体经济效应，该计划为农村劳动者提供最多100天的按法定最低工资计算的劳动。我们利用该计划分阶段推出的特点进行识别，考察了地区内夜间灯光和银行存款的变化。我们发现一致且稳健的证据表明，以夜间灯光衡量，NREGS使人均总体经济产出增加了1-2%。然而，这种效应在各地区并不相等。我们在较贫困地区没有观察到该计划的积极效应，这揭示了一个重要的异质性来源。

27394.title: Measuring Labor-Force Participation and the Incidence and Duration of Unemployment
27394.zh_title: 衡量劳动力参与率、失业发生率与失业持续时间
27394.authors: Hie Joo Ahn, James D. Hamilton
27394.abstract: The underlying data from which the U.S. unemployment rate, labor-force participation rate, and duration of unemployment are calculated contain numerous internal contradictions. This paper catalogs these inconsistencies and proposes a unified reconciliation. We find that the usual statistics understate the unemployment rate and the labor-force participation rate by about two percentage points on average and that the bias in the latter has increased over time. The BLS estimate of the average duration of unemployment substantially overstates the true duration of uninterrupted spells of unemployment and misrepresents what happened to average durations during the Great Recession and its recovery.
27394.zh_abstract: 用于计算美国失业率、劳动力参与率和失业持续时间的底层数据包含许多内部矛盾。本文对这些不一致之处进行了分类，并提出了统一的调和方案。我们发现，通常的统计数据平均低估了失业率和劳动力参与率约两个百分点，且后者中的偏差随时间推移而增大。美国劳工统计局的失业平均持续时间估计值，严重高估了未中断失业期的真实持续时间，并错误地描述了在大衰退及其复苏期间平均持续时间发生的情况。
27394.meta: Programs：EFG, LS, ME；JEL：E24, E32, J01, J64

27393.title: Social Distancing and Social Capital: Why U.S. Counties Respond Differently to COVID-19
27393.zh_title: 社交距离与社会资本：为什么美国各县对COVID-19的反应不同
27393.authors: Wenzhi Ding, Ross Levine, Chen Lin, Wensi Xie
27393.abstract: Since social distancing is the primary strategy for slowing the spread of many diseases, understanding why U.S. counties respond differently to COVID-19 is critical for designing effective public policies. Using daily data from about 45 million mobile phones to measure social distancing we examine how counties responded to both local COVID-19 cases and statewide shelter-in-place orders. We find that social distancing increases more in response to cases and official orders in counties where individuals historically (1) engaged less in community activities and (2) demonstrated greater willingness to incur individual costs to contribute to social objectives. Our work highlights the importance of these two features of social capital—community engagement and individual commitment to societal institutions—in formulating public health policies.
27393.zh_abstract: 由于社交距离是减缓许多疾病传播的主要策略，理解美国各县为何对COVID-19做出不同反应，对于设计有效的公共政策至关重要。利用来自约4500万部手机的日常数据来衡量社交距离，我们考察了各县如何应对本地COVID-19病例和全州范围内的居家令。我们发现，在那些历史上（1）较少参与社区活动且（2）表现出更愿意承担个人成本以贡献于社会目标的县，社交距离对病例和官方命令的反应增加更多。我们的工作强调了社会资本的这两个特征——社区参与和个人对社会制度的承诺——在制定公共卫生政策中的重要性。

27391.title: What Does and Does Not Correlate with COVID-19 Death Rates
27391.zh_title: 与COVID-19死亡率相关与不相关的因素
27391.abstract: We correlate county-level COVID-19 death rates with key variables using both linear regression and negative binomial mixed models, although we focus on linear regression models. We include four sets of variables: socio-economic variables, county-level health variables, modes of commuting, and climate and pollution patterns. Our analysis studies daily death rates from April 4, 2020 to May 27, 2020. We estimate correlation patterns both across states, as well as within states. For both models, we find higher shares of African American residents in the county are correlated with higher death rates. However, when we restrict ourselves to correlation patterns within a given state, the statistical significance of the correlation of death rates with the share of African Americans, while remaining positive, wanes. We find similar results for the share of elderly in the county. We find that higher amounts of commuting via public transportation, relative to telecommuting, is correlated with higher death rates. The correlation between driving into work, relative to telecommuting, and death rates is also positive across both models, but statistically significant only when we look across states and counties. We also find that a higher share of people not working, and thus not commuting either because they are elderly, children or unemployed, is correlated with higher death rates. Counties with higher home values, higher summer temperatures, and lower winter temperatures have higher death rates. Contrary to past work, we do not find a correlation between pollution and death rates. Also importantly, we do not find that death rates are correlated with obesity rates, ICU beds per capita, or poverty rates. Finally, our model that looks within states yields estimates of how a given state's death rate compares to other states after controlling for the variables included in our model; this may be interpreted as a measure of how states are doing relative to others. We find that death rates in the Northeast are substantially higher compared to other states, even when we control for the four sets of variables above. Death rates are also statistically significantly higher in Michigan, Louisiana, Iowa, Indiana, and Colorado. California's death rate is the lowest across all states.
27391.zh_abstract: 我们使用线性回归和负二项混合模型（但重点在线性回归模型）将县级COVID-19死亡率与关键变量进行关联分析。我们纳入四组变量：社会经济变量、县级健康变量、通勤方式以及气候与污染模式。我们的分析研究了2020年4月4日至2020年5月27日期间的每日死亡率。我们分别估计了跨州和州内的相关模式。对于两种模型，我们发现县内非裔美国居民比例较高与较高的死亡率相关。然而，当我们限定在特定州内的相关模式时，死亡率与非裔美国人比例的相关性在统计显著性上有所减弱，尽管仍保持正相关。我们对县内老年人比例也发现了类似结果。我们发现，与远程办公相比，通过公共交通通勤的比例较高与较高的死亡率相关。与远程办公相比，开车上班与死亡率的相关性在两种模型中也为正，但仅在跨州和跨县分析时具有统计显著性。我们还发现，不工作（因此也不通勤，无论是因年老、年幼或失业）的人口比例较高与较高的死亡率相关。房屋价值较高、夏季气温较高和冬季气温较低的县，死亡率也较高。与以往研究相反，我们没有发现污染与死亡率之间的相关性。同样重要的是，我们没有发现死亡率与肥胖率、人均ICU床位或贫困率相关。最后，我们关注州内差异的模型在控制了模型中的变量后，得出了特定州死亡率与其他州相比的估计值；这可以解释为衡量各州相对于其他州表现的一种指标。我们发现，即使控制了上述四组变量，东北部地区的死亡率也显著高于其他州。密歇根州、路易斯安那州、爱荷华州、印第安纳州和科罗拉多州的死亡率在统计上也显著更高。加利福尼亚州的死亡率在所有州中最低。

27390.title: Within-Job Wage Inequality: Performance Pay and Job Relatedness
27390.zh_title: 职业内工资不平等：绩效薪酬与工作关联性
27390.authors: Rongsheng Tang, Yang Tang, Ping Wang
27390.abstract: Over the past few decades, we find that about 80% of the widening residual wage inequality to be within jobs. We propose performance-pay incidence and job relatedness as two primary factors driving within-job inequality and embed them into a sorting equilibrium framework. We show that equilibrium sorting is positive assortative both within-job and across jobs. While performance-pay position amplifies within-job wage inequality through self-selection, the overall relationship between job relatedness and within-job wage inequality is found generally ambiguous. To quantify the role played by these factors, we calibrate the model to the US economy in 2000, where the model can account around 92% of the changes in within-job inequality among the highly educated from 1990 to 2000. Counterfactual analysis shows the contributions of performance-pay incidence and job relatedness are about 42% and 26%, respectively, both higher than that of job-specific productivity. While performance-pay incidence is particularly crucial for within-job wage dispersion in business/professional industry and professional occupation, job relatedness is the most important for mining/goods/construction industry and sales occupation.
27390.zh_abstract: 在过去几十年里，我们发现约80%的残差工资不平等扩大发生在职业内部。我们提出绩效薪酬发生率和职业关联性是驱动职业内不平等的两个主要因素，并将其嵌入一个分类均衡框架中。我们表明，均衡分类在职业内部和职业之间都是正选型匹配的。虽然绩效薪酬职位通过自我选择放大了职业内工资不平等，但职业关联性与职业内工资不平等之间的总体关系被发现通常是模糊的。为了量化这些因素的作用，我们根据2000年的美国经济对模型进行了校准，该模型可以解释1990年至2000年间高学历人群职业内不平等变化的约92%。反事实分析表明，绩效薪酬发生率和职业关联性的贡献分别约为42%和26%，两者均高于职业特定生产率的贡献。虽然绩效薪酬发生率对商业/专业行业和专业职业的职业内工资离散度尤为关键，但职业关联性对采矿/商品/建筑行业和销售职业最为重要。

27389.title: Dynamics of Markups, Concentration and Product Span
27389.zh_title: 加成率、集中度与产品跨度的动态变化
27389.abstract: We develop a model with a finite number of multi-product firms that populate an industry together with a continuum of single product firms, and study the dynamics of this industry that arises from investments in the invention of new products. Consistent with the available evidence, the model predicts rising markups and concentration and a declining labor share. We then examine the dynamics of market shares and product spans in response to improvements in the technologies of the multi-product and single product firms, and the impact of these changes on the steady state distribution of market shares and product spans. Our model predicts the possibility of an inverted-U relationship between labor productivity and product span in the cross-section of firms, for which we provide suggestive evidence. It also predicts that rising entry costs of single-product firms may flatten the relationship between labor productivity and market shares of the large multi-product firms.
27389.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个包含有限数量多产品企业（与大量单一产品企业共同构成一个行业）的模型，并研究了由新产品发明投资所引发的该行业动态变化。与现有证据一致，该模型预测了加成率和集中度的上升以及劳动份额的下降。接着，我们考察了市场份额和产品跨度对多产品企业和单一产品企业技术进步的动态响应，以及这些变化对市场份额和产品跨度稳态分布的影响。我们的模型预测了企业横截面上劳动生产率与产品跨度之间可能存在倒U型关系，并为此提供了初步证据。该模型还预测，单一产品企业进入成本的上升可能会使大型多产品企业的劳动生产率与市场份额之间的关系趋于平缓。

27388.title: Principal Portfolios
27388.authors: Bryan T. Kelly, Semyon Malamud, Lasse H. Pedersen
27388.abstract: We propose a new asset-pricing framework in which all securities’ signals are used to predict each individual return. While the literature focuses on each security’s own-signal predictability, assuming an equal strength across securities, our framework is flexible and includes cross-predictability—leading to three main results. First, we derive the optimal strategy in closed form. It consists of eigenvectors of a “prediction matrix,” which we call “principal portfolios.” Second, we decompose the problem into alpha and beta, yielding optimal strategies with, respectively, zero and positive factor exposure. Third, we provide a new test of asset pricing models. Empirically, principal portfolios deliver significant out-of-sample alphas to standard factors in several data sets.
27388.zh_abstract: 我们提出一个新的资产定价框架，其中所有证券的信号都被用来预测每个单独的收益率。虽然文献侧重于每个证券自身信号的可预测性，并假设各证券的预测强度相同，但我们的框架是灵活的，并包含了交叉可预测性——这带来了三个主要结果。首先，我们推导出最优策略的闭式解。该策略由“预测矩阵”的特征向量构成，我们称之为“主成分投资组合”。其次，我们将问题分解为alpha和beta，分别得到零因子敞口和正因子敞口的最优策略。第三，我们提供了一种新的资产定价模型检验方法。实证上，主成分投资组合在多个数据集中对标准因子产生了显著的样本外alpha。
27388.meta: Programs：AP；JEL：C1, C3, C58, C61, G11, G12, G14

27387.title: Coronavirus: Impact on Stock Prices and Growth Expectations
27387.zh_title: 冠状病毒：对股票价格和增长预期的影响
27387.authors: Niels J. Gormsen, Ralph S. J. Koijen
27387.abstract: We use data from the aggregate stock market and dividend futures to quantify how investors’ expectations about economic growth evolve across horizons in response to the coronavirus outbreak and subsequent policy responses until June 2020. Dividend futures, which are claims to dividends on the aggregate stock market in a particular year, can be used to directly compute a lower bound on growth expectations across maturities or to estimate expected growth using a forecasting model. We show how the actual forecast and the bound evolve over time. As of June 8, our forecast of annual growth in dividends is down 9% in the US and 14% in the EU compared to January 1, and our forecast of GDP growth is down by 2.0% in the US and 3.1% in the EU. The lower bound on the change in expected dividends is -18% in the US and -25% in the EU at the 2-year horizon. News about fiscal stimulus around March 24 boosts the stock market and long-term growth but did little to increase short-term growth expectations. Expected dividend growth has improved since April 1 in both the US and the EU. We conclude by developing and estimating a simple model of the crisis to understand the joint dynamics of short-term dividend futures, stock markets, and bond markets.
27387.zh_abstract: 我们利用股票市场总量和股息期货的数据，量化投资者对经济增长的预期如何在不同期限上因冠状病毒爆发及随后的政策应对（截至2020年6月）而演变。股息期货是对特定年份股票市场总量股息的索取权，可用于直接计算跨期限增长预期的下限，或使用预测模型估计预期增长。我们展示了实际预测和下限如何随时间演变。截至6月8日，与1月1日相比，我们对美国股息年增长率的预测下降了9%，欧盟下降了14%；我们对美国GDP增长的预测下降了2.0%，欧盟下降了3.1%。在2年期限上，预期股息变化的下限在美国为-18%，在欧盟为-25%。3月24日前后关于财政刺激的消息提振了股市和长期增长，但对短期增长预期的提升作用甚微。自4月1日以来，美国和欧盟的预期股息增长均有所改善。最后，我们通过构建和估计一个简单的危机模型来理解短期股息期货、股票市场和债券市场的联合动态。

27386.title: Gains from wage Flexibility and the Zero Lower Bound
27386.zh_title: 工资灵活性的收益与零下限
27386.abstract: We analyze the welfare impact of greater wage flexibility in the presence of an occasionally binding zero lower bound (ZLB) constraint on the nominal interest rate. We show that the ZLB constraint generally amplifies the adverse effects of greater wage flexibility on welfare when the central bank follows a conventional Taylor rule. When demand shocks are the driving force, the ZLB implies that an increase in wage flexibility reduces welfare even under the optimal monetary policy with commitment.
27386.zh_abstract: 我们分析了在名义利率存在偶尔具有约束力的零下限（ZLB）约束时，提高工资灵活性对福利的影响。我们表明，当中央银行遵循传统的泰勒规则时，ZLB约束通常会放大提高工资灵活性对福利的不利影响。当需求冲击是驱动因素时，即使在有承诺的最优货币政策下，ZLB也意味着工资灵活性的提高会降低福利。

27385.title: Insider-Outsider Labor Markets, Hysteresis and Monetary Policy
27385.zh_title: 内部人-外部人劳动力市场、滞后效应与货币政策
27385.abstract: I develop a version of the New Keynesian model with insider-outsider labor markets and hysteresis that can account for the high persistence of European unemployment. I study the implications of that environment for the design of monetary policy. The optimal policy calls for strong emphasis on (un)employment stabilization which a standard interest rate rule fails to deliver, with the gap between the two increasing in the degree of hysteresis. Two simple targetiing rules are shown to approximate well the optimal policy. The properties of the model and effects of different policies are analyzed through the lens of the labor wedge and its components.
27385.zh_abstract: 我构建了一个具有内部人-外部人劳动力市场和滞后效应的新凯恩斯模型版本，该模型可以解释欧洲失业的高度持续性。我研究了这种环境对货币政策设计的影响。最优政策要求强烈关注（失业）就业稳定，而标准的利率规则无法实现这一点，两者之间的差距随着滞后程度的增加而扩大。两种简单的目标规则被证明能够很好地近似最优政策。该模型的性质以及不同政策的效果通过劳动楔子及其组成部分的视角进行分析。

27384.title: Does Policy Communication During Covid Work?
27384.zh_title: 新冠疫情期间的政策沟通有效吗？
27384.authors: Olivier Coibion, Yuriy Gorodnichenko, Michael Weber
27384.abstract: Using a large-scale survey of U.S. households during the Covid-19 pandemic, we study how new information about fiscal and monetary policy responses to the crisis affects households’ expectations. We provide random subsets of participants in the Nielsen Homescan panel with different combinations of information about the severity of the pandemic, recent actions by the Federal Reserve, stimulus measures, as well as recommendations from health officials. This experiment allows us to assess to what extent these policy announcements alter the beliefs and spending plans of households. In short, they do not, contrary to the powerful effects they have in standard macroeconomic models.
27384.zh_abstract: 利用新冠疫情期间对美国住户的大规模调查，我们研究了关于财政和货币政策应对危机的新信息如何影响住户的预期。我们向尼尔森家庭扫描面板中的随机子集参与者提供了关于疫情严重程度、美联储近期行动、刺激措施以及卫生官员建议的不同信息组合。这个实验使我们能够评估这些政策公告在多大程度上改变了住户的信念和支出计划。简而言之，它们没有改变，这与它们在标准宏观经济模型中所具有的强大效应相反。

27383.title: China’s Import Demand for Agricultural Products: The Impact of the Phase One Trade Agreement
27383.zh_title: 中国农产品进口需求：第一阶段贸易协议的影响
27383.abstract: In December 2019, the United States and China reached a Phase One trade agreement, under which China committed to purchase more imports from the United States: $\$12.5$ billion more agricultural imports in 2020 and $\$19.5$ billion more in 2021, as compared to 2017. We show that the most efficient way for China to increase its imports from the United States is to mimic the effect of an import subsidy. If China’s agricultural imports did not otherwise grow from their 2017 values, then the subsidies would need to be 42% and 59% to meet the 2020 and 2021 targets, respectively. These effective subsidies mean that China would divert agricultural imports away from other countries. We find that this trade diversion is especially strong for Australia and Canada, followed by Brazil, Indonesia, Malaysia, Thailand, and Vietnam.
27383.zh_abstract: 2019年12月，美国和中国达成第一阶段贸易协议，根据该协议，中国承诺增加从美国的进口：与2017年相比，2020年农产品进口增加125亿美元，2021年增加195亿美元。我们表明，中国增加从美国进口的最有效方式是模仿进口补贴的效果。如果中国的农产品进口没有从2017年的水平增长，那么补贴率需要分别达到42%和59%才能实现2020年和2021年的目标。这些有效补贴意味着中国将把农产品进口从其他国家转移过来。我们发现，这种贸易转移对澳大利亚和加拿大尤为明显，其次是巴西、印度尼西亚、马来西亚、泰国和越南。

27382.title: The Effectiveness of Life-Preserving Investments in Times of COVID-19
27382.zh_title: COVID-19时期生命保护投资的有效性
27382.authors: Jules H. van Binsbergen, Christian C. Opp
27382.abstract: We analyze the effectiveness of preventive investments aimed at increasing agents' life expectancy, with a focus on influenza and COVID-19 mitigation. Maximizing overall life expectancy requires allocating resources across hazards so as to equalize investments' marginal effectiveness. Based on estimates for the marginal effectiveness of influenza vaccines, we determine the level of COVID-19 mitigation investments that would imply such equalization. Given current projections for COVID-19 mitigation costs, our results suggest that wide-spread influenza vaccination would be an effective life-preserving investment.
27382.zh_abstract: 我们分析了旨在提高个体预期寿命的预防性投资的有效性，重点关注流感和COVID-19的缓解措施。最大化总体预期寿命需要跨风险分配资源，以使投资的边际有效性相等。基于流感疫苗边际有效性的估计，我们确定了实现这种相等所需的COVID-19缓解投资水平。根据当前对COVID-19缓解成本的预测，我们的结果表明，广泛接种流感疫苗将是一项有效的生命保护投资。

27381.title: Default Options and Insurance Demand
27381.authors: Peter John Robinson, W.J. Wouter Botzen, Howard Kunreuther, Shereen J. Chaudhry
27381.abstract: Default options may provide a low-cost way of influencing behaviour without modifying incentives and constraining choices between alternatives. We study whether defaults can be used to increase insurance coverage against low-probability/high-impact risks, like floods, and whether past flood insurance purchases and flooding experience moderate the effect of defaults. Our study uses a naturally occurring difference in experience, comparing the surveyed flood insurance choices of 1,187 homeowners, half of whom are in the Netherlands, where flood insurance penetration rates are low and recent flooding caused minor losses, and the other half of whom are in the United Kingdom (UK), where the opposite is true. We find defaults are effective among homeowners with little to no flood-related experience: in the Netherlands defaults increase the likelihood of insuring by between 17 and 18 percentage points. Although there is no overall effect of defaults in the UK, defaults increase flood insurance coverage for risk averse individuals, and those who have no reported previous flood experience and have not purchased flood insurance. Anticipated regret about not having insurance coverage in the event of a flood, and perceptions about the insurance cost explain between 34 and 37 percent of the relationship between the default and flood insurance demand. We discuss policy implications of our findings.
27381.zh_abstract: 默认选项可能提供一种低成本的方式来影响行为，而无需修改激励措施或限制替代方案之间的选择。我们研究默认选项是否可用于增加针对低概率/高影响风险（如洪水）的保险覆盖，以及过去的洪水保险购买经历和洪水经历是否会调节默认选项的效果。我们的研究利用自然存在的经验差异，比较了1187名房主的调查洪水保险选择，其中一半来自荷兰（洪水保险渗透率低，近期洪水造成轻微损失），另一半来自英国（情况相反）。我们发现，默认选项对几乎没有洪水相关经验的房主有效：在荷兰，默认选项使投保可能性增加17至18个百分点。尽管在英国默认选项没有总体效果，但对于风险规避型个体以及那些没有报告过洪水经历且未购买洪水保险的人，默认选项增加了洪水保险覆盖。对洪水发生时没有保险覆盖的预期遗憾以及对保险成本的感知，解释了默认选项与洪水保险需求之间关系的34%至37%。我们讨论了研究结果的政策含义。

27380.title: Reconsidering Returns
27380.authors: Samuel M. Hartzmark, David H. Solomon
27380.abstract: Investors' perception of performance is biased because the relevant measure, returns, is rarely displayed. Major indices ignore dividends thereby underreporting market performance. Newspapers are more pessimistic on ex-dividend days, consistent with mistaking the index for returns. Market betas should track returns, but track prices more than dividends, creating predictable returns. Mutual funds receive inflows for “beating the S&P 500,” price index based on net asset value (also not a return). Investors extrapolate market indices, not returns, when forming annual performance expectations. Displaying returns by default would ameliorate these issues, which arise despite high attention and agreement on the appropriate measure.
27380.zh_abstract: 投资者对业绩的感知存在偏差，因为相关指标——回报率——很少被显示。主要指数忽略股息，从而低估了市场表现。报纸在除息日更为悲观，这与将指数误认为回报率一致。市场贝塔值应追踪回报率，但追踪价格多于股息，从而产生可预测的回报率。共同基金因“跑赢标普500指数”而获得资金流入，该指数是基于资产净值的价格指数（也不是回报率）。投资者在形成年度业绩预期时，会外推市场指数而非回报率。默认显示回报率将改善这些问题，尽管这些问题是在高度关注且对适当指标达成一致的情况下出现的。
27380.meta: Programs：AP；JEL：G02, G11, G12, G14, N2, N21, N22
